scripts.test:workers: pnpm build:lib && pnpm build:styles && pnpm build:client && vitest run --config vitest.workers.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm build:lib && pnpm build:styles && pnpm build:client && tsc --noEmit
scripts.build:styles: mkdir -p workers/account/src/generated && tailwindcss -i workers/account/src/views/styles.css -o workers/account/src/generated/styles.css --minify && tsx scripts/writeStyleModule.ts
scripts.build:workers: pnpm build:lib && pnpm build:styles && pnpm build:client && tsc --noEmit -p workers/tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: pnpm dev:env && pnpm build:lib && pnpm build:styles && pnpm build:client && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names assets,account,service --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "pnpm dev:assets" "pnpm dev:account" "pnpm dev:service"
scripts.d1:migrations:apply: wrangler d1 migrations apply link-auth --remote --config workers/account/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrations:list: wrangler d1 migrations list link-auth --remote --config workers/account/wrangler.toml
